steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: To convert 21 meters to centimeters, we multiply by the given conversion factor: 1 meter = 100 centimeters.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $2100$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $2100$.
